title: With Iran War, Trump Risks Stepping on Gains From His Own Tax Cuts
summary_full: President Trump’s war in Iran has raised some costs just as many Americans are starting to see savings from last year’s tax cuts.
summary_public: President Trump’s war in Iran has raised some costs just as many Americans are starting to see savings from last year’s tax cuts.
